    def test_delete_user(self):
    
        phone_number = "9145496704"
        otp_value = "8319"   # 4 digit OTP
    
        driver = webdriver.Chrome()
        wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 30)
    
        driver.maximize_window()
        driver.get("https://newsite-qa.matter.in/")
    
        # ---------------------------
        # STEP 1: Click Login
        # ---------------------------
        wait.until(
            EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.XPATH, "//a[text()='Login']"))
        ).click()
    
        # ---------------------------
        # STEP 2: Enter Phone Number
        # ---------------------------
        wait.until(
            EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.XPATH, "//*[@id='mobileNumber']"))
        ).send_keys(phone_number)
    
        # Click Submit
        driver.find_element(By.XPATH, "//*[@type='submit']").click()
    
        # ---------------------------
        # STEP 3: Enter OTP (4 Fields)
        # ---------------------------
        otp_inputs = wait.until(
            EC.presence_of_all_elements_located(
                (By.XPATH, "//*[@class='otp-field__input ']")
            )
        )
    
        # Enter each digit separately
        for i in range(len(otp_inputs)):
            otp_inputs[i].send_keys(otp_value[i])
    
        # Click Submit after OTP
        driver.find_element(By.XPATH, "//*[@type='submit']").click()
    
        # ---------------------------
        # STEP 4: Wait for Login Success
        # ---------------------------
        wait.until(
            EC.presence_of_element_located(
                (By.XPATH, "//img[@alt='Matter Black Logo']")
            )
        )
    
        print("✅ Login Successful")
    
        # ---------------------------
        # STEP 5: Extract Token
        # ---------------------------
        time.sleep(3)
    
        token = driver.execute_script(
            "return window.localStorage.getItem('userToken');"
        )
    
        if not token:
            token = driver.execute_script(
                "return window.localStorage.getItem('token');"
            )
    
        print("Extracted Token:", token)
